reason: Fase T (MarsUI design DNA): additive elevation e1-e6, glass component effects, focus rings, backdrop blur, surface size scale and shadow primitives; deliberate effective-value changes to 22 shipped tokens (dialog min/max width from the misused space scale to the new surface sizes, tooltip/listbox max sizes, tooltip shadow decoupled from the button token onto elevation e2, onmars list dividers gain a visible hairline). Nothing is published yet (0.0.0, private); every change is founder-reviewed in the fase T PR.
